soil_temp.description: Soil temp at 6cm depth, 7-day mean. Sweet spot: 45-61°F (7-16°C), peak at 52°F (11.4°C).

precipitation_14d.description: Total precipitation in prior 14 days. Sweet spot: 1-2 inches (25-50mm).

historical_density.description: Normalized count of historical morel sightings in this grid cell.

forest_cover.description: Whether the area is deciduous/mixed forest (NLCD classes 41, 43).
